nasb.text: We have heard the report of it; Our hands are limp. Anguish has seized us, Pain as of a woman in childbirth.

esv.text: We have heard the report of it; our hands fall helpless; anguish has taken hold of us, pain as of a woman in labor.

cnv.text: 我們聽到有關他們的消息， 手就發軟； 痛苦緊緊抓住我們， 我們疼痛好像正在生產的婦人。

ccb.text: 我们听到这风声，手脚发软， 痛苦万分， 如分娩的妇人。
